title: Web Crawler
description: Crawl a site URL into one markdown file per internal page, edit the markdown, then send selected pages to the knowledge base.
deleteSessionConfirm: Delete this crawl session and its page jobs?
sessionCreated: Crawl session created. Pages will appear as jobs.
sentToKb: Crawled markdown sent to Knowledge Base successfully.
sendToKbError: Failed to send page to KB.
titleRequired: Title is required before sending to KB.
yearInvalid: Year must be a valid number.
chunkOverlapError: Chunk overlap must be smaller than chunk size.
sessionsHint: Select a session to review its crawled pages.
noSessionsHint: Start a crawl to create editable page markdown.
pageJobsHint: Edit markdown and choose final metadata before sending to KB.
noPageJobsHint: Finished crawl sessions will create page jobs here.
newSiteCrawlHint: Discover internal links and turn each page into editable markdown.
previewHint: Edit markdown, then choose final metadata before sending this page to Knowledge Base.
pageAlreadySent: This page has already been sent to the knowledge base.
saveBeforeSend: Save markdown changes before sending to KB.
markdownReady: Markdown is saved and ready to send.
